title: scrophularia rubricaulis
intro: Scrophularia rubricaulis, also known as red figwort, is a perennial plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) native to Europe and Western Asia. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues. Scrophularia rubricaulis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with some herbalists suggesting its use in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
